Part 1: A New Beginning: Part 1

CategoryStory
Typekill
Subtypeship
Level range0
RewardMission Tutorial 1

Defeat 10 Seeker Lvl 0, Seeker Lvl 1, Seeker Lvl 2 in Hyperion

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Go to Hyperion.
  2. Defeat 10 Seeker Lvl 0, Seeker Lvl 1, Seeker Lvl 2.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock A New Beginning: Part 2.

Description

Lieutenant Kreiger: “Great, yet another refugee from Azuron. The last thing I needed… this sector have been flooded by your kind lately. I got some bad news, I doubt you’ll even last one day… If you want to survive you need to learn how to fight, and you need to learn fast. If you want any help you’ll have to earn it.

Go kill 10 of those so called “Seekers” that are swarming the area. And by the way, a small hint: they are cannibals so don’t even think of surrendering.”

Completion

Lieutenant Kreiger: “You’re still alive? That’s quite surprising.. I thought you’d be someones dinner by now. Here’s some steel, resources are essential for long term survival. I’m going to have you prove your worth.”

Part 2: A New Beginning: Part 2

CategoryStory
Typekill
Subtypespawner
Level range0
RewardMission Tutorial 2

Defeat 3 the required spawners in Hyperion

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Go to Hyperion.
  2. Defeat 3 the required spawners.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock A New Beginning: Part 3.

Description

Lieutenant Kreiger promised to help us out if we can destroy 3 hostile space stations.

Completion

Lieutenant Kreiger: “Good job there. Let me introduce myself. My name is Jacob Kreiger, I’m with the Antor Federation, I’m a Lieutenant in the 2nd division of the main fleet. We are trying to keep the order in this region, but we can’t do much good these days. I’m going to give you 200 steel, you can use this to acquire a weapon. I suggest that you head over to the Antor Federation Armory.

Part 3: A New Beginning: Part 3

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission Tutorial 3

Travel / deliver to AF Armoury

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to AF Armoury.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock A New Beginning: Part 4.

Description

Let’s go to the Antor Federation Armoury and investigate if we can get any better weapons.

Completion

Lieutenant Kreiger: “Find anything you like? Weapons is the only thing that’s not in low supply around here. Everything has gone to hell lately, since the downfall of the Antor Federation started. We used to control the entire Antor sector… sigh... but now.. we can’t even keep our citizens safe. There are pirates, slavers, cannibals, raiders and fanatics wreaking havoc everywhere. The key to survival is to keep your tech ahead of everyone elses, a very costly endeavour. One effective way of acquiring resources if through salvaging, I can talk with an associate and get you a special deal on junk.”

Part 4: A New Beginning: Part 4

CategoryStory
Typepickup
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission Tutorial 4

Collect 50 Metal Scrap

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Collect 50 Metal Scrap.
  2. Turn in the quest to unlock A New Beginning: Part 5.

Description

Destroy hostile ships and salvage as much as you can, about 50 pieces of Metal Scrap should be a good start. Lieutenant Kreiger promised to get us a good deal on metal junk.

Completion

Lieutenant Kreiger: “I managed to negotiate a special deal on the junk, if you go to the Antor Federation Smelting Plant you’ll get at least twice the normal rate.“

Part 5: A New Beginning: Part 5

CategoryStory
Typerecycle
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission Tutorial 5

Recycle 50 Metal Scrap

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Collect 50 Metal Scrap and recycle it at the requested station.
  2. Turn in the quest to unlock A New Beginning: Part 6.

Description

Go to the Antor Federation Smelting Plant and recycle the junk, Lieutenant Kreiger promised that you’ll receive a big bonus.

Completion

Lieutenant Kreiger: “By now you should have enough resources to upgrade some of your tech by now. Head over to the Antor Federation Research Station, I’ll ask them to share some of their know-how.”

Part 6: A New Beginning: Part 6

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission Tutorial 6

Travel / deliver to AF Research Station

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to AF Research Station.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock A New Beginning: Part 7.

Description

Go to the Antor Federation Research Station and check out the avilable upgrades for you ship!

Completion

No completion text was exposed for this quest.

Part 7: A New Beginning: Part 7

CategoryStory
Typekill
Subtypeship
Level range0
RewardMission Tutorial 7

Defeat 12 Slaver lvl 2 in Hyperion

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Erath, E9Loua8gsEK8v8fX3aPy4w.
  2. Defeat 12 Slaver lvl 2.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock A New Beginning: Part 8.

Description

Lieutenant Kreiger: “Sorry, I fell asleep, there’s rarely any time to get some rest… sigh... Perhaps you can help me to deal with one of my problems now? The planet Erath is besieged by slavers, their space station is generating a shield that’s blocking access to the planet. Go there clear out 12 slaver ships.”

Completion

Lieutenant Kreiger: “Thank you! Take out that station and land on the planet and check out what’s going on with the colony While you’re down there feel free to scavenge for minerals.”

Part 8: A New Beginning: Part 8

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission Tutorial 8

Travel / deliver to Erath

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Erath.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock A New Beginning: Part 9.

Description

Land on the planet and checks what’s going on.

*Hint: Use the opportunity to scavenge the planet for minerals

Completion

We arrived just in time, it seems like the slavers didn’t have time to land on the planet yet, everyone in the colony is safe!

Part 9: A New Beginning: Part 9

CategoryStory
Typekill
Subtypeship
Level range0
RewardMission Tutorial 9

Defeat 50 Zlatte Lvl 1, Zlatte Lvl 2, Seeker Lvl 0, Seeker Lvl 1, Seeker Lvl 2, Launcher lvl 3, Slaver lvl 2 in Hyperion

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Go to Hyperion.
  2. Defeat 50 Zlatte Lvl 1, Zlatte Lvl 2, Seeker Lvl 0, Seeker Lvl 1, Seeker Lvl 2, Launcher lvl 3, Slaver lvl 2.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock A New Beginning: Part 10.

Description

Lieutenant Kreiger: “You saved the day for thousands of settlers. Thanks again!”

Are you interested in earning some real resources? Hyperion is overrun by these pirate, slaver and cannibal factions, since the Antor Federation can’t handle all of these on alone. So we have issued a bounty on all of these blasted degenerates in Hyperion, take down 50 hostiles and you’ll receive a large reward.

Completion

Lieutenant Kreiger: “Excellent work, hope this reward will suffice. While you were gone there’s been some really bad news. A giant ship “Tefat” has been sighted on multiple occasions, thus far no one has been able to stand up to it. After seeing you fighting… I can’t help thinking that you might have a chance. Do you dare facing it?“

Part 10: A New Beginning: Part 10

CategoryStory
Typekill
Subtypeboss
Level range0
RewardMission Tutorial 10

Defeat Tefat in Hyperion

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Go to Hyperion.
  2. Defeat Tefat.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock A New Beginning: Part 11.

Description

A giant ship “Tefat” has been sighted on multiple occasions, thus far no one has been able to stand up to it. Are you up for the challenge? Watch the map for a red Boss icon indicating its position.

Completion

Lieutenant Kreiger: “I can’t believe it! You made it! Truly amazing! You’ve been a great help all civilized beings in the Hyperion system. I’m sorry for my attitude when we first met.”

Part 11: A New Beginning: Part 11

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission Tutorial 11

Travel / deliver to Warp Gate

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Warp Gate.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.

Description

Lieutenant Kreiger: “I don’t think there’s much left for someone like you to do around here. There’s a warp gate in the northeastern corner of Hyperion. The Warp Gate provides a fast way to travel between systems and without a Warp Gate it would take about two years to reach the closest neighbouring system. The Antor Federation actually built most of the warp gates, although it was during the golden era, more than 500 years have past since then end of that age.”

Completion

Lieutenant Kreiger: “It was a pleasant surprise to encounter a captain as capable as you, I wish you the best of luck in your future adventures.”

Want to improve this wiki? Contributions are welcome on github.com/guedesite/astroflux-wiki.
